Exclusive preview

The Local Guide — curated by your hotel,
bookable through your concierge.

Every guest who asks "what should I do today?" gets a personalised guide — tailored to their interests, powered by your partners. Every booking generates revenue for your hotel.

🌊 Landmarks
⛵ Boat Tour
Sunset Catamaran Cruise
📍 Limassol · Mediterranean Sea
Sail into the golden hour on a private catamaran along the Cyprus coastline. Swim stops, fresh fruit, and the most memorable sunset of your stay.
⭐ Most requested by guests
🍷 Winery
Troodos Wine Villages Tour
📍 Troodos Mountains · 45 min drive
Discover the ancient Commandaria wine region — tastings at family wineries, meze lunch in a traditional village, and breathtaking mountain views.
⭐ Half-day · Private driver available
🤿 Diving
Zenobia Wreck Dive
📍 Larnaca · 45 min drive
Dive the Zenobia — one of the top ten wreck dives in the world. A Swedish ferry resting 42m below the surface, teeming with marine life.
⭐ Rated top dive site in the Mediterranean
🐴 Activity
Horse Riding at Sunset
📍 Limassol Countryside · 20 min drive
Ride through the Cyprus countryside as the sun sets over the hills. Suitable for all levels — from first-timers to experienced riders.
⭐ Available morning & sunset sessions
💆 Wellness
Wellness & Spa Retreat
📍 Limassol · Partner Spa
A full day of restoration — massages, thermal pools, aromatherapy, and detox treatments. Let the concierge arrange everything, including transport.
⭐ Popular with guests staying 3+ nights
🍽️ Dining
Traditional Cyprus Tavern
📍 Limassol Old Town · 10 min
A real meze experience — kleftiko, halloumi, koupepia, and a table that never empties. The kind of dinner guests talk about for years.
⭐ Reservation recommended · concierge can arrange
🏛️ Culture
Limassol Old Town
📍 Walking distance · 10 min
Cobblestone lanes, vine-draped tavernas, and centuries of history. The best neighbourhood in Cyprus for an evening stroll or a long lunch.
🎵 Nightlife
Kolla Market
📍 Limassol · 1st Sunday of the month
An unmissable monthly gathering — artisan crafts, live concerts, street food, and the energy of the whole city under one roof of hanging lanterns.
⭐ Every 1st Sunday · free entry
🏡 Villages
Cyprus Mountain Villages
📍 Troodos · 1 hr drive
Step into another century in the stone villages of the Troodos mountains. Church frescoes, homemade loukoumades, and views that go on forever.
🌊 Landmark
Petra tou Romiou
📍 Paphos · 1 hr drive
The birthplace of Aphrodite — a legendary rock rising from the sea at the edge of a pink and blue sky. One of Cyprus's most iconic landscapes.
🏛️ Museum
Cyprus Railway Museum
📍 Evrychou · 1 hr drive
A hidden gem — the restored station of Cyprus's long-gone railway, with original locomotives and carriages in a beautiful mountain setting.
🕌 Culture
Kykkos Monastery
📍 Troodos Mountains · 1.5 hr drive
One of Cyprus's most revered monasteries, perched high in the Troodos mountains with panoramic views over ancient pine forests.

We'll show you exactly how it works — and how to set it up — on the call.
Add it to your calendar if you haven't already.
